---
title: "Experience"
---

# Experience

## Hammer Museum

**Gallery Ambassador**\
Los Angeles, CA \| May 2025 – Present

-   Provide professional customer service to visitors in a fast-paced museum environment.
-   Monitor gallery spaces to ensure the safety of artwork and compliance with museum policies.
-   Communicate effectively with visitors and staff while adapting to varying activity levels.

## Wescom Credit Union

**Data Architecture Intern**\
Anaheim, CA \| June 2025 – Sep 2025

-   Developed SQL queries using SSMS and Snowflake to analyze branch-level membership activity.
-   Analyzed UCLA student survey data to evaluate brand awareness of Wescom.
-   Built Power BI dashboards to visualize trends in student banking behavior and engagement.
-   Collaborated with the Data Science team to observe machine learning workflows using Dataiku.

## Diablo Valley College

**Math Tutor**\
Pleasant Hill, CA \| Sept 2023 – May 2024

-   Provided one-on-one tutoring to students in mathematics.
-   Explained complex concepts in a clear and accessible way.
-   Helped over 200 students strengthen their understanding of mathematical problem solving.

## Resume

[Download My Resume](files/Resume_Jesslyn_Evangelista.pdf)
